shortDescription: Spacious 1-bedroom condo in Willowdale with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 5460 Yonge Street, Unit 1702 in the vibrant Willowdale neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The sleeping quarters comprise 1 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
